improvement_prompts.name: initial_prompt
improvement_prompts.description: Standard improvement prompt for initial refinement attempts
improvement_prompts.prompt:
Rewrite this content to reduce AI-detection likelihood while maintaining technical accuracy:

REWRITING GUIDELINES:
- Break overly consistent paragraph lengths
- Vary sentence structures and lengths
- Add natural contractions (don't, isn't, etc.)
- Include casual transitions between ideas
- Replace generic statements with specific examples
- Add appropriate industry terminology
- Introduce slight variations in tone
- Ensure technical accuracy is maintained

Original text:
{previous_version}

Expert feedback:
{feedback}

Strategy guidance:
{strategy}

improvement_prompts.name: reduce_ai_patterns
improvement_prompts.description: Focused on significantly reducing AI patterns
improvement_prompts.prompt:
Rewrite this content to significantly reduce AI-detection patterns while maintaining technical accuracy:

CRITICAL AI PATTERN REDUCTION:
- Break repetitive paragraph structures and sentence patterns
- Remove perfectly balanced "on one hand, on the other hand" comparisons
- Replace academic/formal phrases with industry-specific language
- Add natural contractions (don't, isn't, you'll, we're, etc.)
- Mix very short sentences with medium ones for varied rhythm
- Include 1-2 mild colloquial expressions that an expert would use
- Add a practical insight that suggests personal experience
- Keep all technical information accurate

Original text:
{previous_version}

Expert feedback:
{feedback}

Strategy guidance:
{strategy}

improvement_prompts.name: increase_human_qualities
improvement_prompts.description: Focused on enhancing human-like writing patterns
improvement_prompts.prompt:
Rewrite this content to significantly increase human-like writing qualities while maintaining technical accuracy:

HUMAN WRITING ENHANCEMENT:
- Add a specific anecdote or practical example from industry experience
- Include mild personal opinions where appropriate ("I've found that..." or "In my experience...")
- Use natural language patterns with occasional sentence fragments
- Vary technical depth - go deeper in 1-2 areas, lighter on others
- Add industry jargon or specialized terminology where appropriate
- Use natural transitions ("Actually," "By the way," "The thing is,")
- Include an unexpected insight that shows specialized knowledge
- Maintain all technical accuracy

Original text:
{previous_version}

Expert feedback:
{feedback}

Strategy guidance:
{strategy}

improvement_prompts.name: balanced_improvement
improvement_prompts.description: Balanced approach improving both AI-detection and human-like qualities
improvement_prompts.prompt:
Rewrite this content using a balanced approach to improve both AI-detection and human-like qualities:

BALANCED IMPROVEMENT APPROACH:
- Balance formal technical content with occasional informal language
- Introduce 1-2 practical examples or insights from experience
- Vary paragraph lengths and sentence structures naturally
- Use selective industry terminology where appropriate
- Add mild colloquialisms or natural phrasing
- Include some focused opinions while maintaining overall balance
- Create natural transitions between topics
- Preserve all technical accuracy and details

Original text:
{previous_version}

Expert feedback:
{feedback}

Strategy guidance:
{strategy}

improvement_prompts.name: light_refinement
improvement_prompts.description: Light touch improvements for content that's already scoring well
improvement_prompts.prompt:
Make light refinements to this already well-written content to further improve naturalness:

SUBTLE REFINEMENT APPROACH:
- Preserve most of the existing content and structure
- Make minor adjustments to sentence flow
- Add 1-2 natural transitions or connectors
- Replace any overly formal phrasing with more natural equivalents
- Add minimal personal voice where appropriate
- Ensure varied paragraph and sentence structure is maintained
- Keep all technical content and accuracy intact

Original text:
{previous_version}

Expert feedback:
{feedback}

Strategy guidance:
{strategy}
